title: Iracema Vargas
html:
Iracema Vargas

Yahir's mother. Surname Vargas (distinct from his Gonzalez) is a meaningful genealogical marker — Mexican-immigrant maternal line. Named explicitly for the first time in the corpus in the May 2021 graduation group letter, where Yahir ghostwrites in her voice to fix his own scheduling mistake: "My name is Iracema Vargas. I am the mother of Yahir Gonzalez."

Across the surfaced notes she is:

  • The FBA hustle co-conspirator (2019 11 13 coding zeal "quarantine business for dad")
  • The financial backstop in 2025 (2025 09 23 how im scraping by)
  • The custodial-TDA-account opener for the 17-year-old value investor (2020 04 23 go to diamond)
  • The letter-writing voice Yahir most often borrows when he needs to communicate as the family
  • By Dec 2021 (2021 12 14 mom dad christmas gift ideas) Yahir is gift-listing for her with aspirational specificity: "live near sun, massage for Christmas, work with 3-5 year olds (illusion)"

The pattern: Iracema is the family's communication infrastructure, and Yahir is her literate proxy when English-administrative letters need writing. The graduation-letter is the canonical artifact of this dynamic.

Source summaries

  • 2019 11 13 coding zeal
  • 2020 04 23 go to diamond
  • 2021 05 30 iracema graduation letter
  • 2021 12 14 mom dad christmas gift ideas
  • 2025 09 23 how im scraping by
